intro: Prunus hypoleuca, also known as the silver buffaloberry, is a shrub native to the dry regions of western North America. The plant is valued for its potential health benefits, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help protect against chronic diseases such as heart disease and cancer.
